findings.message: Active claim on completed node — stale claim not auto-released on completion
findings.remediation: Claims should auto-release on node completion. Non-blocking: claim will expire via TTL.

combined_verdict.rationale: Zero errors across both envelope and corruption checks. Single warning (stale claim) is non-blocking and self-resolving via TTL expiry. All CLI commands produce valid envelopes. Corruption detector successfully identifies real state inconsistencies.

improvementOpportunities: Auto-release claims on node completion to eliminate claimed-completed warnings
Chart command could emit envelope wrapping render output (currently text-exempt)
